name: kerfed-protos

metadata.name: kerfed.protos
metadata.summary: Built Python bindings for the Kerfed Proto messages.

documentation:
# kerfed.protos

Kerfed APIs all consume and produce data defined as Protobuf 3 messages or the [JSON mapping](https://protobuf.dev/programming-guides/proto3/#json) of these messages. The message definitions and documentation can be found on [buf.build](https://buf.build/kerfed/protos/). Bindings for Typescript and Python are available through the default packaging systems:

- npm add [@kerfed/protos](https://www.npmjs.com/package/@kerfed/protos)
- pip install [kerfed.protos](https://pypi.org/project/kerfed.protos/)

All APIs consuming and emitting JSON use the `preserving_proto_field_name` option which prevents field names like `geom_id` from being mapped to `geomId`, and the `use_integers_for_enums` option. Most users of the REST interface should use client libraries like [kerfed.client](https://pypi.org/project/kerfed.client/) instead of this package. 

```
from google.protobuf.json_format import MessageToJson
json = MessageToJson(request, 
                     preserving_proto_field_name=True,
                     use_integers_for_enums=True)
```

modules.name: kerfed.protos.common.v1
documentation: Helper to keep proto imports in one place.

functions.name: kerfed.protos.common.v1.sum_money
documentation:
Sum a list of Money messages.

Parameters
------------
money : List[Money]
  List of money

functions.name: kerfed.protos.common.v1.message_to_dict
documentation:
Convert a protobuf message to dict preserving the field names.

Parameters
-----------
msg : protobuf
  Message to convert to a dict

Returns
-----------
converted : dict
  Message converted to a dict.

functions.name: kerfed.protos.common.v1.format_money
documentation:
Format a protobuf money message.

Parameters
-----------
money : kerfed.protos.v1.money_pb2.Money
  Money object.

Returns
--------
formatted : str
  Formatted string to show a user.

functions.name: kerfed.protos.common.v1.numpy_to_rigid
documentation:
Convert a (4, 4) rigid homogenous transform
to a protobuf RigidTransform object.

Parameters
-----------
matrix : (4, 4) float
  Rigid homogeneous transform.

Returns
------------
rigid
  Rigid transform object.

functions.name: kerfed.protos.common.v1.rigid_to_numpy
documentation:
Convert a proto RigidTransform into a numpy array.

Parameters
--------------
rigid
  Transformation passed over the wire.

Returns
-------------
matrix : (4, 4) float
  Homogeneous transformation matrix.

functions.name: kerfed.protos.common.v1.numpy_to_proto
documentation:
Convert a `numpy.ndarray` to a `proto.NDArray` object.

Parameters
-----------
array : numpy.ndarray
  Multidimensional array

Returns
----------
serialized : proto.NDArray
  Serialized ND array.

functions.name: kerfed.protos.common.v1.proto_to_numpy
documentation:
Convert a Protobuf NDArray message to a numpy array.

Parameters
-----------
message : kerfed.protos.v1.ndarray.NDArray
  Serialized array

Returns
-------------
array : (shape) float64 or int64
  Data converted

functions.name: kerfed.protos.common.v1.proto_to_datetime
documentation:
Convert a proto timestamp method to a Python datetime.

Parameters
-----------
stamp : kerfed.protos.common.v1.Timestamp
  Over the wire proto timestamp

Returns
----------
date : datetime
  Native Python datetime object.

functions.name: kerfed.protos.common.v1.datetime_to_proto
documentation:
Convert a native Python datetime into a proto message.

Parameters
--------------
stamp : datetime
  Source timestamp.

Returns
---------
proto : kerfed.protos.common.v1.Timestamp
  Converted timestamp in proto.

functions.name: kerfed.protos.common.v1.mesh_to_proto
documentation: Convert a native Trimesh object into a proto Mesh.

functions.name: kerfed.protos.common.v1.proto_to_mesh
documentation: Convert a protobuf Geometry into a native Trimesh object.
